description_long: This bungalow features a single-story rectangular structure with a light blue exterior and a flat, slightly sloped roof. The front facade is defined by a wooden porch with railings, steps, and two large trees flanking the entrance, providing shade and greenery. The porch area is furnished and partially enclosed by railings, with potted plants adding to the residential charm. Windows are modestly sized and symmetrically placed on the sides and rear, with a single window on the short end and two on the longer side. The landscaping includes low shrubs and grass around the base, enhancing the suburban feel. The overall design is simple and functional, with a focus on comfort and outdoor living space.
description: A single-story light blue bungalow with a flat roof, front porch, and surrounding trees and shrubs. The structure features modest windows and a welcoming, landscaped entrance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the porch, entrance steps, railings, and two large trees flanking the entry.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the long blue wall, a single window, porch area, and adjacent greenery.
description_view_2: Rear view with a single window centered on the short wall and tree tops visible behind the roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with two windows, porch partially visible, and trees on the right.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with side and rear windows
